message.content: You are implementing fixes to the existing Vue 3 / TypeScript frontend at repo/frontend/src/. Do not modify the backend. Do not change anything that is already working. Address each item below exactly as specified. --- Fix 1 — Pet-Owner Review Submission (Missing Feature) 1a. API function — add to src/api/modules.ts: export function createReview(payload: { visit_order_id: number rating: number tags: string[] text: string images?: File[] }) { const form = new FormData() form.append('visit_order_id', String(payload.visit_order_id)) form.append('rating', String(payload.rating)) payload.tags.forEach((t) => form.append('tags[]', t)) form.append('text', payload.text) if (payload.images) { payload.images.slice(0, 5).forEach((f) => form.append('images[]', f)) } return apiRequest<{ data: Record }, FormData>('/reviews', { method: 'POST', body: form as unknown as FormData, }) } ▎ Note: apiRequest already sets Content-Type: application/json when body is present. For multipart, skip the JSON body path — either add a multipart?: boolean flag to RequestOptions that omits the Content-Type header (letting the browser set multipart/form-data with boundary automatically), or call fetch directly for this one endpoint. 1b. New view — create src/views/ReviewSubmitView.vue: - Not behind the staff RBAC guard (pet owners use it on a handed tablet) - Props/route param: visitOrderId from the URL - Form fields: - Star rating: 1–5 (render 5 clickable star buttons, highlight selected and below) - Tags: comma-separated text input (or a set of toggleable tag chips: cleanliness, communication, wait_time, treatment, pricing) - Review text:

content.text:
## Frontend Codebase Exploration Report

### 1. Full Directory Structure

```
C:\TASK-52\repo\frontend\src/
├── api/
│   ├── auth.ts
│   ├── client.test.ts
│   ├── http.ts
│   └── modules.ts
├── assets/
│   ├── hero.png
│   ├── vite.svg
│   └── vue.svg
├── components/
│   ├── HelloWorld.vue
│   ├── modules/
│   │   ├── AnalyticsModule.vue
│   │   ├── ContentWorkbenchModule.vue
│   │   ├── InventoryModule.vue
│   │   ├── RentalsModule.vue
│   │   └── ReviewsModerationModule.vue
│   ├── ui/
│   │   ├── ConfirmationDialog.vue
│   │   ├── FilterBar.vue
│   │   ├── FormValidationSummary.vue
│   │   ├── GlobalMessages.vue
│   │   ├── PaginatedTable.vue
│   │   └── StatusBadge.vue
│   └── workspace/
│       └── WorkspaceTemplate.vue
├── composables/
│   ├── useApiErrorBridge.ts
│   └── useSafeAction.ts
├── router/
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── menu.test.ts
│   └── menu.ts
├── stores/
│   ├── auth.test.ts
│   ├── auth.ts
│   └── ui.ts
├── types/
│   └── auth.ts
├── views/
│   ├── AppShellView.vue
│   ├── LoginView.vue
│   ├── NotFoundView.vue
│   ├── UnauthorizedView.vue
│   └── workspaces/
│       ├── ClinicManagerView.vue
│       ├── ContentWorkspaceView.vue
│       ├── InventoryClerkView.vue
│       ├── SystemAdminView.vue
│       └── TechnicianDoctorView.vue
├── App.vue
├── main.ts
└── style.css
```

---

### 2. Contents of src/api/modules.ts

This file exports 24 API functions for various modules:

**Health & Analytics:**
- `fetchHealth()` - Returns service status, timestamp, and currency config
- `fetchInventoryLowStock()` - Analytics endpoint for low stock items
- `fetchReviewSummary()` - Review metrics (average score, negative rate, response time)
- `fetchAuditLogs()` - Audit trail data
- `fetchOverdueRentals()` - Overdue rental analytics

**Rentals Module:**
- `fetchRentalAssets(filters)` - With query params: q, status, facility_id, category, scan_code
- `checkoutRental(payload)` - POST to /rentals/checkouts
- `returnRental(checkoutId)` - POST to /rentals/checkouts/{id}/return
- `requestAssetTransfer(assetId, payload)` - POST to request facility transfer
- `approveAssetTransfer(transferId)` - POST to approve transfer

**Inventory Module:**
- `fetchInventoryItems(params)` - GET with dynamic query params
- `createInventoryReceipt(payload)` - POST /inventory/receipts
- `createInventoryIssue(payload)` - POST /inventory/issues
- `createInventoryTransfer(payload)` - POST /inventory/transfers
- `createStocktake(payload)` - POST /inventory/stocktakes
- `addStocktakeLines(stocktakeId, payload)` - POST lines to stocktake
- `approveStocktakeVariance(stocktakeId, reason)` - POST with reason
- `setReservationStrategy(payload)` - PUT /inventory/reservation-strategy
- `reserveServiceOrder(serviceOrderId, payload)` - POST reserve items
- `closeServiceOrder(serviceOrderId)` - POST close order

**Content Module:**
- `createContentItem(payload)` - POST /content/items
- `updateContentItem(contentId, payload)` - PATCH /content/items/{id}
- `submitContentApproval(contentId)` - POST submit for approval
- `approveContent(contentId)` - POST approve
- `rejectContent(contentId)` - POST reject
- `rollbackContent(contentId, version)` - POST rollback to version
- `fetchContentVersions(contentId)` - GET version history

**Reviews Module:**
- `fetchReviews(filters)` - GET with dynamic filters
- `respondReview(reviewId, response_text)` - POST response
- `appealReview(reviewId, reason_category)` - POST appeal
- `hideReview(reviewId)` - POST hide

All functions use the `apiRequest` helper with generic type parameters for request/response bodies.

---

### 3. Contents of src/router/index.ts

Vue Router configuration with the following route structure:

**Routes:**
- `/login` - LoginView component (public)
- `/` - AppShell component (requires auth)
  - Empty path redirects to first allowed path based on user roles
  - `/workspace/system-admin` - SystemAdminView (roles: system_admin, permission: audit.read)
  - `/workspace/clinic-manager` - ClinicManagerView (roles: clinic_manager/system_admin, permission: analytics.read)
  - `/workspace/inventory-clerk` - InventoryClerkView (roles: inventory_clerk/clinic_manager/system_admin, permission: inventory.read)
  - `/workspace/technician-doctor` - TechnicianDoctorView (roles: technician_doctor/clinic_manager/system_admin, permission: rentals.checkout)
  - `/workspace/content` - ContentWorkspaceView (roles: content_editor/content_approver/system_admin, permission: content.read)
- `/unauthorized` - UnauthorizedView (requires auth)
- `/:pathMatch(.*)*` - NotFoundView (catch-all)

**Navigation Guards:**
- `beforeEach` guard checks:
  - If unauthenticated but has token, hydrates user from `/me` endpoint
  - Redirects authenticated users away from login to first allowed path
  - Enforces auth requirement with redirect to login
  - Checks role and permission-based access control
  - Helper function `routeAllowsAccess()` validates both permissions and roles

---

### 4. Contents of src/components/modules/RentalsModule.vue

A comprehensive rental management Vue 3 component with the following features:

**Data State:**
- Asset list with filtering (query, status, scan code)
- Checkout form (asset_id, renter_type, renter_id, expected_return_at, pricing_mode, deposit_cents)
- Return form (checkout_id)
- Transfer request form (asset_id, to_facility_id, requested_effective_at, reason)
- Transfer approval form (transfer_id)
- Error messages and pagination

**Computed Properties:**
- `filtered` - Filters by query string and status
- `pagedRows` - Pagination (10 items per page)
- `statusOptions` - Dynamic status enum from data

**Methods:**
- `formatCurrency()` - Converts cents to USD
- `countdownLabel()` - Shows time remaining for rented/overdue items (updates every second)
- `loadAssets()` - Fetches rentals with optional scan code filter
- `validateCheckout()` - Validates required checkout fields
- `submitCheckout()` - Creates checkout, updates UI status to "rented"
- `submitReturn()` - Marks checkout as returned
- `submitTransferRequest()` - Requests facility transfer
- `submitTransferApproval()` - Approves pending transfers
- `scanLookup()` - Barcode/QR lookup by scan code

**UI Features:**
- Asset ledger table with columns: asset_code, name, status (with status badges), replacement_cost
- Countdown timer for rented/overdue items
- Split-pane layout: left side for asset ledger, right side for action forms
- Real-time status display and countdown updates via `setInterval`

---

### 5. Contents of src/views/AppShellView.vue

Main application shell/layout component that:

**Features:**
- Sidebar navigation with VetOps branding
- Displays authenticated user's display_name
- Dynamic menu based on user permissions and roles
- Sign out button with confirmation dialog

**Logic:**
- `visibleMenuItems` computed property filters menu items by:
  - User's permissions (all permissions required)
  - User's roles (must have at least one role in the menu item)
- `handleLogout()` method:
  - Shows confirmation dialog
  - Calls `authStore.signOut()`
  - Redirects to login page

**Template:**
- Two-column layout: sidebar + content-area
- Uses RouterLink for navigation
- RouterView for nested route components

---

### 6. Contents of src/stores/auth.test.ts

Vitest test suite for auth store with:

**Setup:**
- Creates mock localStorage using Map-based implementation
- Sets active Pinia instance before each test
- Stubs global fetch for API calls

**Test Cases:**

1. **"signs in and hydrates authenticated user"**
   - Mocks login endpoint (POST) returning token, expires_in_seconds, user data, security flags
   - Mocks fetchMe endpoint returning user with permissions
   - Verifies: isAuthenticated is true, username matches, captchaRequired is false

2. **"enables captcha state when backend requires captcha"**
   - Mocks login with 422 response containing CAPTCHA_REQUIRED error code
   - Verifies: captchaRequired is true, isAuthenticated is false, error is thrown

Test credentials used: username='clinic.manager', password='VetOpsSecure123'

---

### 7. Contents of src/stores/auth.ts

Pinia authentication store with:

**State:**
- `token` - Auth token (persisted to localStorage with key 'vetops.auth.token')
- `user` - AuthUser object or null
- `loading` - Boolean for async operations
- `captchaRequired` - Boolean flag for CAPTCHA requirement
- `sessionExpired` - Boolean flag for expired sessions

**Computed:**
- `isAuthenticated` - Token is not empty AND user is not null

**Methods:**

1. `persistToken(nextToken)` - Stores token in state and localStorage, calls `setAuthToken()`
2. `hydrate()` - If token exists, fetches user via `fetchMe()` endpoint
3. `signIn(username, password, captchaToken?)` - 
   - Calls `login()` endpoint
   - Sets token via `persistToken()`
   - Fetches user data
   - Catches CAPTCHA_REQUIRED errors and sets `captchaRequired` flag
4. `signOut()` - Calls logout endpoint, clears session
5. `clearSession()` - Resets user to null, clears token
6. `markSessionExpired()` - Sets sessionExpired flag and clears session
7. `hasPermission(permission)` - Checks if user has permission
8. `hasAnyRole(roles)` - Checks if user has any role in list (empty list returns true)

**Storage Handling:**
- Uses `getStorage()` helper to safely access localStorage (handles SSR/non-browser contexts)
- Persists token for session resumption

---

### 8. Existing Composables in src/composables/

**Two composables exist:**

**A. useApiErrorBridge.ts**
- Lifecycle: subscribes to API errors on mount, unsubscribes on unmount
- Error handling:
  - Detects SESSION_EXPIRED or UNAUTHENTICATED errors → marks session expired
  - All errors → displays via UI store as error messages
- Uses `subscribeApiErrors()` function from http.ts
- Uses `toActionableMessage()` to format error messages

**B. useSafeAction.ts**
- Exports `run<T>()` async function wrapper for safe action execution
- Features:
  - Sets `busy` ref during execution
  - Catches errors and displays via `toActionableMessage()`
  - Shows optional success message via UI store
  - Returns result or null on error
  - Always clears busy flag in finally block
- Returns object with: `busy` ref and `run` function

Both composables integrate with the UI store for messaging and auth store for session management.

---

### 9. Package.json for test/build scripts

Location: C:\TASK-52\repo\frontend\package.json

**Scripts:**
- `dev` - `vite` (dev server)
- `lint` - `vue-tsc --noEmit` (type checking)
- `test` - `vitest run` (run tests once)
- `build` - `vue-tsc -b && vite build` (type check + build)
- `preview` - `vite preview` (preview production build)
- `ci` - `npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build` (full CI pipeline)

**Dependencies:**
- pinia: ^3.0.3
- vue-router: ^4.6.2
- vue: ^3.5.30

**DevDependencies:**
- @types/node: ^24.12.0
- @vitejs/plugin-vue: ^6.0.5
- @vue/tsconfig: ^0.9.0
- typescript: ~5.9.3
- vite: ^8.0.1
- vitest: ^4.0.0
- vue-tsc: ^3.2.5

---

### 10. Vitest Config Files

**File: C:\TASK-52\repo\frontend\vite.config.ts**

This is the unified Vite/Vitest configuration:

```typescript
- Exports configuration object from vitest/config
- env vars: VITE_BACKEND_ORIGIN (defaults to http://localhost:8000)
- plugins: @vitejs/plugin-vue for Vue 3 SFC support
- server: 
  - host: 0.0.0.0
  - port: 5173 (strict)
  - proxy: /api → backend origin
- preview:
  - host: 0.0.0.0
  - port: 4173 (strict)
- test:
  - environment: node
  - include: src/**/*.test.ts
- define: __APP_MODE__ global variable
```

**Note:** There is NO separate vitest.config.ts file. Configuration is in vite.config.ts using `defineConfig` from 'vitest/config'.

---

## Summary

The frontend is a Vue 3 + TypeScript application with:
- **State Management:** Pinia (auth, ui stores)
- **Routing:** Vue Router with role-based access control
- **Testing:** Vitest with mocked localStorage
- **API Integration:** Typed fetch wrapper with error handling
- **UI Components:** Reusable modules (Rentals, Inventory, Analytics, etc.), UI components (tables, forms, badges), and composables for common patterns
- **Build:** Vite with TypeScript compilation and dev proxy to backend

114	function routeAllowsAccess(route: RouteLocationNormalized, authStore: ReturnType<typeof useAuthStore>): boolean {
115	  const permissions = ((route.meta.permissions as string[] | undefined) ?? [])
116	  const roles = ((route.meta.roles as string[] | undefined) ?? [])
117	
118	  const permissionAllowed = permissions.length === 0 || permissions.every((permission) => authStore.hasPermission(permission))
119	  const roleAllowed = roles.length === 0 || authStore.hasAnyRole(roles)
120	
121	  return permissionAllowed && roleAllowed
122	}
123	
124	router.beforeEach(async (to) => {
125	  const authStore = useAuthStore()
126	
127	  if (authStore.user === null && authStore.token) {
128	    await authStore.hydrate()
129	  }
130	
131	  if (to.path === '/login' && authStore.isAuthenticated && authStore.user) {
132	    return firstAllowedPath(authStore.user.roles)
133	  }
134	
135	  const requiresAuth = Boolean(to.meta.requiresAuth)
136	  if (requiresAuth && !authStore.isAuthenticated) {
137	    return { path: '/login', query: { redirect: to.fullPath } }
138	  }
139	
140	  if (requiresAuth && !routeAllowsAccess(to, authStore)) {
141	    return '/unauthorized'
142	  }
143	
144	  return true
145	})
146	
147	export default router

51	export function firstAllowedPath(roleCodes: RoleCode[]): string {
52	  const roles = new Set(roleCodes)
53	  const found = menuItems.find((item) => item.roles.some((role) => roles.has(role)))
54	  return found?.path ?? '/unauthorized'
55	}

content.text:
Lint, tests, and build all pass cleanly. Here's a summary of everything implemented:

---

**Fix 1 — Review Submission**
- `src/api/http.ts`: Added `multipart?: boolean` to `RequestOptions` — skips `Content-Type: application/json` and `JSON.stringify` so FormData passes through with browser-set boundary
- `src/api/modules.ts`: Added `createReview()` (FormData POST) and `fetchPublishedCarousel()`
- `src/views/ReviewSubmitView.vue`: Standalone card layout with 5-star rating, tag chips + free-text fallback, textarea (max 1000 chars), multi-image upload (max 5), spinner, thank-you on success, error message on failure
- `src/router/index.ts`: Added `/review-submit/:visitOrderId` outside `requiresAuth`

**Fix 2 — Countdown Timer**
- `AssetRow` extended with `expected_return_at: string | null`
- `loadAssets()` populates it
- `countdownLabel(row)` now correctly computes `Date.parse(expected_return_at) - nowTs` → shows `"due in Xm"` or `"overdue Xm"`
- Template slot updated to `{ value, row }` passing full row

**Fix 3 — Inactivity Timeout**
- `src/composables/useInactivityTimeout.ts`: resets a 15-minute timer on `mousemove/keydown/pointerdown/scroll`; calls `markSessionExpired()` + redirects to `/login` on expiry
- `src/views/AppShellView.vue`: calls `useInactivityTimeout()`

**Fix 4 — Photo / Spec Preview**
- `AssetRow` extended with `photo_url` and `specs`; populated in `loadAssets()`
- `{ key: 'photo_url', label: 'Photo' }` column added; renders 48×48 thumbnail or `—`
- `#cell-name` slot shows name with specs below in small muted text

**Fix 5 — Double-Booking Guard**
- Extracted `validateCheckoutForm()` to `src/utils/rentalValidation.ts` as a pure function
- `validateCheckout()` in the component uses it — checks `asset.status !== 'available'` before any API call

**Fix 6 — Tests (12 total)**
- `src/router/guard.test.ts`: 3 cases (unauth→/login, wrong role→/unauthorized, correct role→target)
- `src/stores/auth.test.ts`: added `signOut` test verifying token/user cleared and localStorage cleaned
- `src/utils/rentalValidation.test.ts`: 3 cases (valid, missing return date, double-booking)

**Fix 7 — Staff Terminal**
- `src/views/StaffTerminalView.vue`: fetches carousel items, auto-advances every 5s, dot indicators, dark terminal layout
- `src/router/index.ts`: added `/staff-terminal` outside `requiresAuth`

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Support\ApiResponse;
use App\Support\AuditLogger;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Gate;

class ContentReviewsController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(private readonly AuditLogger $auditLogger)
    {
    }

    public function createContent(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'content_type' => ['required', 'in:announcement,homepage_carousel'],
            'title' => ['required', 'string'],
            'body' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'facility_ids' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'department_ids' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'role_codes' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'tags' => ['nullable', 'array'],
        ]);

        $id = DB::table('content_items')->insertGetId([
            'content_type' => $validated['content_type'],
            'title' => $validated['title'],
            'body' => $validated['body'] ?? null,
            'status' => 'draft',
            'current_version' => 1,
            'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        DB::table('content_targets')->insert([
            'content_item_id' => $id,
            'facility_ids' => json_encode($validated['facility_ids'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'department_ids' => json_encode($validated['department_ids'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'role_codes' => json_encode($validated['role_codes'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'tags' => json_encode($validated['tags'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'draft', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function updateContent(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $item = DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($item === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Content not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $payload = $request->only(['title', 'body']);
        $nextVersion = (int) $item->current_version + 1;
        $payload['current_version'] = $nextVersion;
        $payload['updated_by_user_id'] = $request->user()?->id;
        $payload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update($payload);

        $targetPayload = [];
        foreach (['facility_ids', 'department_ids', 'role_codes', 'tags'] as $key) {
            if ($request->has($key)) {
                $targetPayload[$key] = json_encode($request->input($key, []), JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
            }
        }
        if ($targetPayload !== []) {
            $targetPayload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();
            DB::table('content_targets')->where('content_item_id', $id)->update($targetPayload);
        }

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, (string) $item->status, $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function submitApproval(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'pending_approval',
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'pending_approval', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function approve(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'content.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Approver role required.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'published',
            'published_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'published', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function reject(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'content.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Approver role required.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'rejected',
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'rejected', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function rollback(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $version = (int) $request->integer('version');
        $snapshot = DB::table('content_versions')
            ->where('content_item_id', $id)
            ->where('version_number', $version)
            ->first();

        if ($snapshot === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Version not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $data = json_decode((string) $snapshot->snapshot_json, true, 512, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'title' => $data['title'] ?? null,
            'body' => $data['body'] ?? null,
            'status' => 'published',
            'current_version' => ((int) DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->value('current_version')) + 1,
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'published', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function versions(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_versions')->where('content_item_id', $id)->orderByDesc('version_number')->get()]);
    }

    public function createReview(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'visit_order_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'between:1,5'],
            'tags' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'text' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'facility_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'provider_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'images' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:5'],
            'images.*.filename' => ['required_with:images', 'string'],
            'images.*.path' => ['required_with:images', 'string'],
            'images.*.checksum_sha256' => ['required_with:images', 'string', 'size:64'],
            'images.*.bytes_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        $reviewId = DB::table('reviews')->insertGetId([
            'visit_order_id' => $validated['visit_order_id'],
            'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'] ?? null,
            'provider_id' => $validated['provider_id'] ?? null,
            'rating' => $validated['rating'],
            'tags' => json_encode($validated['tags'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'text' => $validated['text'] ?? null,
            'visibility_status' => 'visible',
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        foreach ($validated['images'] ?? [] as $image) {
            DB::table('review_media')->insert([
                'review_id' => $reviewId,
                'filename' => $image['filename'],
                'path' => $image['path'],
                'checksum_sha256' => $image['checksum_sha256'],
                'bytes_size' => (int) ($image['bytes_size'] ?? 0),
                'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        }

        return response()->json([
            'data' => DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $reviewId)->first(),
            'media' => DB::table('review_media')->where('review_id', $reviewId)->get(),
        ], 201);
    }

    public function reviewResponse(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate(['response_text' => ['required', 'string']]);
        DB::table('review_responses')->insert([
            'review_id' => $id,
            'responded_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'response_text' => $validated['response_text'],
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => ['status' => 'responded']]);
    }

    public function reviewAppeal(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'reason_category' => ['required', 'in:abusive_language,harassment,privacy,spam,other'],
            'assigned_to_user_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        $policyVersion = (string) DB::table('review_moderation_policies')
            ->where('category', $validated['reason_category'])
            ->where('is_active', true)
            ->orderByDesc('id')
            ->value('version');

        $caseId = DB::table('review_moderation_cases')->insertGetId([
            'review_id' => $id,
            'reason_category' => $validated['reason_category'],
            'policy_version' => $policyVersion !== '' ? $policyVersion : 'v1',
            'status' => 'open',
            'requested_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'assigned_to_user_id' => $validated['assigned_to_user_id'] ?? null,
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('review_moderation_cases')->where('id', $caseId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function reviewHide(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'visibility_status' => 'hidden',
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function listReviews(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $query = DB::table('reviews');
        foreach (['facility_id', 'provider_id', 'rating'] as $filter) {
            if ($request->filled($filter)) {
                $query->where($filter, $request->query($filter));
            }
        }

        return response()->json(['data' => $query->get()]);
    }

    private function snapshotContentVersion(int $contentId, string $status, ?int $userId): void
    {
        $item = (array) DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $contentId)->first();
        DB::table('content_versions')->insert([
            'content_item_id' => $contentId,
            'version_number' => (int) $item['current_version'],
            'snapshot_json' => json_encode($item, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'status' => $status,
            'created_by_user_id' => $userId,
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Support\ApiResponse;
use App\Support\AuditLogger;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Gate;

class RentalsController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(private readonly AuditLogger $auditLogger)
    {
    }

    public function listAssets(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $query = DB::table('rental_assets');
        if ($request->filled('q')) {
            $q = (string) $request->query('q');
            $query->where(fn ($builder) => $builder
                ->where('name', 'like', "%{$q}%")
                ->orWhere('asset_code', 'like', "%{$q}%"));
        }
        foreach (['status', 'facility_id', 'category'] as $filter) {
            if ($request->filled($filter)) {
                $query->where($filter, $request->query($filter));
            }
        }
        if ($request->filled('scan_code')) {
            $scanCode = (string) $request->query('scan_code');
            $query->where(fn ($builder) => $builder->where('qr_code', $scanCode)->orWhere('barcode', $scanCode));
        }

        return response()->json(['data' => $query->get()]);
    }

    public function createAsset(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'facility_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'asset_code' => ['required', 'string'],
            'name' => ['required', 'string'],
            'replacement_cost_cents' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'daily_rate_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'weekly_rate_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'deposit_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        $replacement = (int) $validated['replacement_cost_cents'];
        $defaultDeposit = max((int) round($replacement * 0.2), 5000);
        $deposit = (int) ($validated['deposit_cents'] ?? $defaultDeposit);

        $assetId = DB::transaction(function () use ($validated, $deposit, $request) {
            $id = DB::table('rental_assets')->insertGetId([
                'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'],
                'asset_code' => $validated['asset_code'],
                'name' => $validated['name'],
                'replacement_cost_cents' => $validated['replacement_cost_cents'],
                'daily_rate_cents' => (int) ($validated['daily_rate_cents'] ?? 0),
                'weekly_rate_cents' => (int) ($validated['weekly_rate_cents'] ?? 0),
                'deposit_cents' => $deposit,
                'status' => 'available',
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')->insert([
                'asset_id' => $id,
                'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'],
                'effective_from_utc' => now()->utc(),
                'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            return $id;
        });

        $this->auditLogger->log($request, 'rentals', 'asset_create', 'success', $request->user(), ['asset_id' => $assetId]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $assetId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function updateAsset(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $payload = $request->all();
        $payload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();

        DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $id)->update($payload);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function checkout(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'asset_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'renter_type' => ['required', 'string'],
            'renter_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'checked_out_at' => ['required', 'date'],
            'expected_return_at' => ['required', 'date', 'after:checked_out_at'],
            'pricing_mode' => ['required', 'in:daily,weekly'],
            'deposit_cents' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'fee_terms' => ['nullable', 'string'],
        ]);

        $conflict = DB::table('rental_checkouts')
            ->where('asset_id', $validated['asset_id'])
            ->whereNull('returned_at')
            ->exists();

        if ($conflict) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('DOUBLE_BOOKING', 'Asset already has an open checkout.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 409);
        }

        $checkoutId = DB::transaction(function () use ($validated, $request) {
            $id = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->insertGetId([
                'asset_id' => $validated['asset_id'],
                'renter_type' => $validated['renter_type'],
                'renter_id' => $validated['renter_id'],
                'checked_out_at' => $validated['checked_out_at'],
                'expected_return_at' => $validated['expected_return_at'],
                'pricing_mode' => $validated['pricing_mode'],
                'deposit_cents' => $validated['deposit_cents'],
                'fee_terms' => $validated['fee_terms'] ?? null,
                'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $validated['asset_id'])->update([
                'status' => 'rented',
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            return $id;
        });

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $checkoutId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function returnCheckout(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $checkout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($checkout === null || $checkout->returned_at !== null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Checkout not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::transaction(function () use ($checkout, $id, $request) {
            DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->update([
                'returned_at' => now()->utc(),
                'closed_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $checkout->asset_id)->update([
                'status' => 'available',
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        });

        return response()->json([], 204);
    }

    public function getCheckout(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $checkout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($checkout === null) {
            return response()->json(['data' => null], 404);
        }

        $overdueAt = Carbon::parse($checkout->expected_return_at)->addHours(2);
        return response()->json([
            'data' => [
                ... (array) $checkout,
                'is_overdue' => $checkout->returned_at === null && now()->utc()->greaterThan($overdueAt),
                'overdue_at' => $overdueAt->toISOString(),
            ],
        ]);
    }

    public function requestTransfer(Request $request, int $assetId): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'rentals.transfer.request')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Only manager/admin can request transfer.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'to_facility_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'requested_effective_at' => ['required', 'date'],
            'reason' => ['required', 'string'],
        ]);

        $asset = DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $assetId)->first();
        if ($asset === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Asset not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $hasOpenCheckout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('asset_id', $assetId)->whereNull('returned_at')->exists();
        if ($hasOpenCheckout || $asset->status === 'maintenance') {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('TRANSFER_BLOCKED', 'Asset has open checkout or maintenance lock.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 409);
        }

        $transferId = DB::table('asset_transfers')->insertGetId([
            'asset_id' => $assetId,
            'from_facility_id' => $asset->facility_id,
            'to_facility_id' => $validated['to_facility_id'],
            'requested_effective_at' => $validated['requested_effective_at'],
            'reason' => $validated['reason'],
            'status' => 'requested',
            'requested_by_user_id' => $user->id,
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $transferId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function approveTransfer(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'rentals.transfer.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Only manager/admin can approve transfer.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        $transfer = DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($transfer === null || $transfer->status !== 'requested') {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Transfer request not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::transaction(function () use ($transfer, $id, $user) {
            DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->update([
                'status' => 'completed',
                'decision_by_user_id' => $user->id,
                'decision_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')
                ->where('asset_id', $transfer->asset_id)
                ->whereNull('effective_to_utc')
                ->update([
                    'effective_to_utc' => now()->utc(),
                    'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
                ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')->insert([
                'asset_id' => $transfer->asset_id,
                'facility_id' => $transfer->to_facility_id,
                'effective_from_utc' => now()->utc(),
                'transfer_request_id' => $id,
                'created_by_user_id' => $user->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $transfer->asset_id)->update([
                'facility_id' => $transfer->to_facility_id,
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        });

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }
}

<?php

return [
    'timezone' => env('VETOPS_API_TIMEZONE', 'UTC'),

    'currency' => [
        'code' => env('VETOPS_CURRENCY_CODE', 'USD'),
        'amount_format' => 'integer_cents',
    ],

    'auth' => [
        'inactivity_timeout_minutes' => (int) env('VETOPS_AUTH_INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT_MINUTES', 15),
        'login_max_attempts' => (int) env('VETOPS_AUTH_LOGIN_MAX_ATTEMPTS', 10),
        'login_decay_seconds' => (int) env('VETOPS_AUTH_LOGIN_DECAY_SECONDS', 600),
        // Empty env becomes (int) '' === 0, which would require CAPTCHA on every login; treat as default.
        'captcha_after_failures' => (function (): int {
            $raw = env('VETOPS_AUTH_CAPTCHA_AFTER_FAILURES');
            if ($raw === null || $raw === '') {
                return 5;
            }
            $n = (int) $raw;

            return $n > 0 ? $n : 5;
        })(),
        'captcha_bypass_token' => env('VETOPS_AUTH_CAPTCHA_BYPASS_TOKEN', 'local-captcha-ok'),
    ],
];

<?php

namespace App\Providers;

use Carbon\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;

class AppServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    /**
     * Register any application services.
     */
    public function register(): void
    {
        //
    }

    /**
     * Bootstrap any application services.
     */
    public function boot(): void
    {
        date_default_timezone_set(config('vetops.timezone', 'UTC'));

        Carbon::serializeUsing(
            static fn (Carbon $carbon): string => $carbon->copy()->utc()->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s\Z')
        );
    }
}

7	    environment:
8	      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-vetops}
9	      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-vetops}

name: vetops

services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-vetops}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-vetops}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-vetops_local_password}
      POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: --encoding=UTF8 --lc-collate=C --lc-ctype=C
      TZ: ${TZ:-UTC}
      PGTZ: ${TZ:-UTC}
    expose:
      - "5432"
    volumes:
      - vetops_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    networks:
      - vetops_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-vetops} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-vetops}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 12
      start_period: 10s

  backend:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      APP_ENV: ${APP_ENV:-production}
      APP_DEBUG: ${APP_DEBUG:-false}
      APP_URL: ${APP_URL:-http://localhost:8080}
      APP_KEY: ${APP_KEY:-}
      LOG_CHANNEL: ${LOG_CHANNEL:-stack}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
      APP_LOCALE: en
      APP_FALLBACK_LOCALE: en
      DB_CONNECTION: pgsql
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_PORT: 5432
      DB_DATABASE: ${POSTGRES_DB:-vetops}
      DB_USERNAME: ${POSTGRES_USER:-vetops}
      DB_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-vetops_local_password}
      SESSION_DRIVER: file
      CACHE_STORE: file
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: database
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: local
      FRONTEND_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: ${FRONTEND_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:8080,http://127.0.0.1:8080,http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173}
      VETOPS_API_TIMEZONE: ${TZ:-UTC}
      VETOPS_CURRENCY_CODE: USD
      RUN_MIGRATIONS: ${RUN_MIGRATIONS:-true}
      RUN_SEEDERS: ${RUN_SEEDERS:-true}
      WARMUP_CACHE: ${WARMUP_CACHE:-true}
      WAIT_FOR_DB: ${WAIT_FOR_DB:-true}
      DB_WAIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS: ${DB_WAIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS:-60}
      TZ: ${TZ:-UTC}
    expose:
      - "8000"
    volumes:
      - vetops_backend_storage:/var/www/storage
      - vetops_backend_bootstrap_cache:/var/www/bootstrap/cache
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - vetops_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health >/dev/null || exit 1"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 30s

  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: production
      args:
        VITE_API_BASE_PATH: ${VITE_API_BASE_PATH:-/api/v1}
        VITE_BACKEND_ORIGIN: ${VITE_BACKEND_ORIGIN:-http://backend:8000}
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${FRONTEND_PORT:-8080}:80"
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - vetops_edge
      - vetops_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -q -O - http://127.0.0.1/ >/dev/null || exit 1"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 10s

networks:
  vetops_edge:
    driver: bridge
  vetops_internal:
    driver: bridge
    internal: true

volumes:
  vetops_db_data:
  vetops_backend_storage:
  vetops_backend_bootstrap_cache:
  vetops_frontend_node_modules:

<?php

namespace Tests\Feature\Domain;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Testing\RefreshDatabase;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Tests\TestCase;

class ContentReviewsAuditApiTest extends TestCase
{
    use RefreshDatabase;

    protected function setUp(): void
    {
        parent::setUp();
        $this->seed();
    }

    public function test_content_workflow_review_moderation_and_q15_partition_archive(): void
    {
        $editorToken = $this->login('content.editor');
        $approverToken = $this->login('content.approver');

        $content = $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$editorToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/content/items', [
                'content_type' => 'announcement',
                'title' => 'Shift Update',
                'body' => 'Inventory shelf move.',
                'role_codes' => ['inventory_clerk'],
            ])
            ->assertCreated();

        $contentId = (int) $content->json('data.id');

        $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$editorToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/content/items/'.$contentId.'/submit-approval')
            ->assertOk();

        $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$approverToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/content/items/'.$contentId.'/approve')
            ->assertOk();

        $managerToken = $this->login('clinic.manager');
        $review = $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$managerToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/reviews', [
                'visit_order_id' => 90001,
                'rating' => 1,
                'text' => 'Unhappy service',
                'images' => [[
                    'filename' => 'image1.jpg',
                    'path' => 'storage/reviews/image1.jpg',
                    'checksum_sha256' => str_repeat('a', 64),
                    'bytes_size' => 100,
                ]],
            ])
            ->assertCreated();

        $reviewId = (int) $review->json('data.id');

        $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$managerToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/reviews/'.$reviewId.'/appeal', [
                'reason_category' => 'abusive_language',
            ])
            ->assertCreated();

        DB::table('audit_event_partitions')->insert([
            'partition_key' => '2024_01_facility_1',
            'month_utc' => '2024-01',
            'facility_id' => 1,
            'storage_tier' => 'warm',
            'row_count' => 100,
            'bytes_size' => 1024,
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $adminToken = $this->login('system.admin');
        $this->withHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer '.$adminToken)
            ->postJson('/api/v1/audit/archive', [
                'before_month' => '2024-09',
                'compress' => true,
            ])
            ->assertOk();
    }

    private function login(string $username): string
    {
        $res = $this->withHeader('X-Workstation-Id', 'ws-frontdesk-01')
            ->postJson('/api/v1/auth/login', [
                'username' => $username,
                'password' => 'VetOpsSecure123',
            ])
            ->assertOk();

        return (string) $res->json('token');
    }
}

1	import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'
2	import type { RouteLocationNormalized } from 'vue-router'
3	import { useAuthStore } from '../stores/auth'
4	import { firstAllowedPath, type AppRouteMeta } from './menu'
5	
6	const LoginView = () => import('../views/LoginView.vue')
7	const AppShell = () => import('../views/AppShellView.vue')
8	const SystemAdminView = () => import('../views/workspaces/SystemAdminView.vue')

14	const NotFoundView = () => import('../views/NotFoundView.vue')
15	
16	const router = createRouter({
17	  history: createWebHistory(),
18	  routes: [
19	    {
20	      path: '/login',
21	      name: 'login',
22	      component: LoginView,
23	      meta: { label: 'Login' } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
24	    },
25	    {
26	      path: '/',
27	      component: AppShell,
28	      meta: { requiresAuth: true } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
29	      children: [
30	        {
31	          path: '',
32	          redirect: () => {
33	            const authStore = useAuthStore()
34	            return firstAllowedPath(authStore.user?.roles ?? [])
35	          },
36	        },
37	        {
38	          path: '/workspace/system-admin',
39	          name: 'workspace-system-admin',
40	          component: SystemAdminView,
41	          meta: {
42	            label: 'System Administration',
43	            requiresAuth: true,
44	            permissions: ['audit.read'],
45	            roles: ['system_admin'],
46	            showInMenu: true,
47	          } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
48	        },
49	        {
50	          path: '/workspace/clinic-manager',
51	          name: 'workspace-clinic-manager',
52	          component: ClinicManagerView,
53	          meta: {
54	            label: 'Clinic Manager',
55	            requiresAuth: true,
56	            permissions: ['analytics.read'],
57	            roles: ['clinic_manager', 'system_admin'],
58	            showInMenu: true,
59	          } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
60	        },
61	        {
62	          path: '/workspace/inventory-clerk',
63	          name: 'workspace-inventory-clerk',
64	          component: InventoryClerkView,
65	          meta: {
66	            label: 'Inventory Clerk',
67	            requiresAuth: true,
68	            permissions: ['inventory.read'],
69	            roles: ['inventory_clerk', 'clinic_manager', 'system_admin'],
70	            showInMenu: true,
71	          } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
72	        },
73	        {
74	          path: '/workspace/technician-doctor',
75	          name: 'workspace-technician-doctor',
76	          component: TechnicianDoctorView,
77	          meta: {
78	            label: 'Technician / Doctor',
79	            requiresAuth: true,
80	            permissions: ['rentals.checkout'],
81	            roles: ['technician_doctor', 'clinic_manager', 'system_admin'],
82	            showInMenu: true,
83	          } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
84	        },

92	            permissions: ['content.read'],
93	            roles: ['content_editor', 'content_approver', 'system_admin'],
94	            showInMenu: true,
95	          } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
96	        },
97	      ],
98	    },
99	    {
100	      path: '/unauthorized',

103	      meta: { label: 'Unauthorized', requiresAuth: true } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
104	    },

115	      meta: { label: 'Staff Terminal' } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
116	    },

120	      component: NotFoundView,
121	      meta: { label: 'Not Found' } satisfies AppRouteMeta,
122	    },
123	  ],
124	})
125	
126	function routeAllowsAccess(route: RouteLocationNormalized, authStore: ReturnType<typeof useAuthStore>): boolean {
127	  const permissions = ((route.meta.permissions as string[] | undefined) ?? [])
128	  const roles = ((route.meta.roles as string[] | undefined) ?? [])
129	
130	  const permissionAllowed = permissions.length === 0 || permissions.every((permission) => authStore.hasPermission(permission))
131	  const roleAllowed = roles.length === 0 || authStore.hasAnyRole(roles)
132	
133	  return permissionAllowed && roleAllowed
134	}
135	
136	router.beforeEach(async (to) => {
137	  const authStore = useAuthStore()
138	
139	  if (authStore.user === null && authStore.token) {
140	    await authStore.hydrate()
141	  }
142	
143	  if (to.path === '/login' && authStore.isAuthenticated && authStore.user) {
144	    return firstAllowedPath(authStore.user.roles)
145	  }
146	
147	  const requiresAuth = Boolean(to.meta.requiresAuth)
148	  if (requiresAuth && !authStore.isAuthenticated) {
149	    return { path: '/login', query: { redirect: to.fullPath } }
150	  }
151	
152	  if (requiresAuth && !routeAllowsAccess(to, authStore)) {
153	    return '/unauthorized'
154	  }
155	
156	  return true
157	})
158	
159	export default router

content.text: Now add the two controller methods to ContentReviewsController:

content.content: The file C:\TASK-52\repo\backend\app\Http\Controllers\Api\ContentReviewsController.php has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Support\ApiResponse;
use App\Support\AuditLogger;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Gate;

class ContentReviewsController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(private readonly AuditLogger $auditLogger)
    {
    }

    public function createContent(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'content_type' => ['required', 'in:announcement,homepage_carousel'],
            'title' => ['required', 'string'],
            'body' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'facility_ids' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'department_ids' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'role_codes' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'tags' => ['nullable', 'array'],
        ]);

        $id = DB::table('content_items')->insertGetId([
            'content_type' => $validated['content_type'],
            'title' => $validated['title'],
            'body' => $validated['body'] ?? null,
            'status' => 'draft',
            'current_version' => 1,
            'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        DB::table('content_targets')->insert([
            'content_item_id' => $id,
            'facility_ids' => json_encode($validated['facility_ids'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'department_ids' => json_encode($validated['department_ids'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'role_codes' => json_encode($validated['role_codes'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'tags' => json_encode($validated['tags'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'draft', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function updateContent(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $item = DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($item === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Content not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $payload = $request->only(['title', 'body']);
        $nextVersion = (int) $item->current_version + 1;
        $payload['current_version'] = $nextVersion;
        $payload['updated_by_user_id'] = $request->user()?->id;
        $payload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update($payload);

        $targetPayload = [];
        foreach (['facility_ids', 'department_ids', 'role_codes', 'tags'] as $key) {
            if ($request->has($key)) {
                $targetPayload[$key] = json_encode($request->input($key, []), JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
            }
        }
        if ($targetPayload !== []) {
            $targetPayload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();
            DB::table('content_targets')->where('content_item_id', $id)->update($targetPayload);
        }

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, (string) $item->status, $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function submitApproval(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'pending_approval',
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'pending_approval', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function approve(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'content.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Approver role required.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'published',
            'published_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'published', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function reject(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'content.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Approver role required.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'status' => 'rejected',
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'rejected', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function rollback(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $version = (int) $request->integer('version');
        $snapshot = DB::table('content_versions')
            ->where('content_item_id', $id)
            ->where('version_number', $version)
            ->first();

        if ($snapshot === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Version not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $data = json_decode((string) $snapshot->snapshot_json, true, 512, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
        DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'title' => $data['title'] ?? null,
            'body' => $data['body'] ?? null,
            'status' => 'published',
            'current_version' => ((int) DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->value('current_version')) + 1,
            'updated_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        $this->snapshotContentVersion($id, 'published', $request->user()?->id);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function versions(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('content_versions')->where('content_item_id', $id)->orderByDesc('version_number')->get()]);
    }

    public function createReview(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'visit_order_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'between:1,5'],
            'tags' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'text' => ['nullable', 'string'],
            'facility_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'provider_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'images' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:5'],
            'images.*.filename' => ['required_with:images', 'string'],
            'images.*.path' => ['required_with:images', 'string'],
            'images.*.checksum_sha256' => ['required_with:images', 'string', 'size:64'],
            'images.*.bytes_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        $reviewId = DB::table('reviews')->insertGetId([
            'visit_order_id' => $validated['visit_order_id'],
            'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'] ?? null,
            'provider_id' => $validated['provider_id'] ?? null,
            'rating' => $validated['rating'],
            'tags' => json_encode($validated['tags'] ?? [], JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'text' => $validated['text'] ?? null,
            'visibility_status' => 'visible',
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        foreach ($validated['images'] ?? [] as $image) {
            DB::table('review_media')->insert([
                'review_id' => $reviewId,
                'filename' => $image['filename'],
                'path' => $image['path'],
                'checksum_sha256' => $image['checksum_sha256'],
                'bytes_size' => (int) ($image['bytes_size'] ?? 0),
                'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        }

        return response()->json([
            'data' => DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $reviewId)->first(),
            'media' => DB::table('review_media')->where('review_id', $reviewId)->get(),
        ], 201);
    }

    public function reviewResponse(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate(['response_text' => ['required', 'string']]);
        DB::table('review_responses')->insert([
            'review_id' => $id,
            'responded_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'response_text' => $validated['response_text'],
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => ['status' => 'responded']]);
    }

    public function reviewAppeal(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'reason_category' => ['required', 'in:abusive_language,harassment,privacy,spam,other'],
            'assigned_to_user_id' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        $policyVersion = (string) DB::table('review_moderation_policies')
            ->where('category', $validated['reason_category'])
            ->where('is_active', true)
            ->orderByDesc('id')
            ->value('version');

        $caseId = DB::table('review_moderation_cases')->insertGetId([
            'review_id' => $id,
            'reason_category' => $validated['reason_category'],
            'policy_version' => $policyVersion !== '' ? $policyVersion : 'v1',
            'status' => 'open',
            'requested_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
            'assigned_to_user_id' => $validated['assigned_to_user_id'] ?? null,
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('review_moderation_cases')->where('id', $caseId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function reviewHide(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        if (! DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->exists()) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Review not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->update([
            'visibility_status' => 'hidden',
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('reviews')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function listReviews(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $query = DB::table('reviews');
        foreach (['facility_id', 'provider_id', 'rating'] as $filter) {
            if ($request->filled($filter)) {
                $query->where($filter, $request->query($filter));
            }
        }

        return response()->json(['data' => $query->get()]);
    }

    private function snapshotContentVersion(int $contentId, string $status, ?int $userId): void
    {
        $item = (array) DB::table('content_items')->where('id', $contentId)->first();
        DB::table('content_versions')->insert([
            'content_item_id' => $contentId,
            'version_number' => (int) $item['current_version'],
            'snapshot_json' => json_encode($item, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR),
            'status' => $status,
            'created_by_user_id' => $userId,
            'created_at_utc' => now()->utc(),
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Support\ApiResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class ReviewTokenController extends Controller
{
    public function issue(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $request->validate(['visit_order_id' => 'required|string|max:64']);

        $raw     = Str::random(40);
        $hash    = hash('sha256', $raw);
        $expires = now()->utc()->addHours(48);

        DB::table('visit_review_tokens')->insert([
            'visit_order_id' => $request->input('visit_order_id'),
            'token_hash'     => $hash,
            'expires_at'     => $expires,
            'created_at'     => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at'     => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json([
            'token'      => $raw,
            'expires_at' => $expires->toISOString(),
            'request_id' => ApiResponse::requestId($request),
        ], 201);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Support\ApiResponse;
use App\Support\AuditLogger;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Gate;

class RentalsController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(private readonly AuditLogger $auditLogger)
    {
    }

    public function listAssets(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $query = DB::table('rental_assets');
        if ($request->filled('q')) {
            $q = (string) $request->query('q');
            $query->where(fn ($builder) => $builder
                ->where('name', 'like', "%{$q}%")
                ->orWhere('asset_code', 'like', "%{$q}%"));
        }
        foreach (['status', 'facility_id', 'category'] as $filter) {
            if ($request->filled($filter)) {
                $query->where($filter, $request->query($filter));
            }
        }
        if ($request->filled('scan_code')) {
            $scanCode = (string) $request->query('scan_code');
            $query->where(fn ($builder) => $builder->where('qr_code', $scanCode)->orWhere('barcode', $scanCode));
        }

        return response()->json(['data' => $query->get()]);
    }

    public function createAsset(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'facility_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'asset_code' => ['required', 'string'],
            'name' => ['required', 'string'],
            'replacement_cost_cents' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'daily_rate_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'weekly_rate_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'deposit_cents' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        $replacement = (int) $validated['replacement_cost_cents'];
        $defaultDeposit = max((int) round($replacement * 0.2), 5000);
        $deposit = (int) ($validated['deposit_cents'] ?? $defaultDeposit);

        $assetId = DB::transaction(function () use ($validated, $deposit, $request) {
            $id = DB::table('rental_assets')->insertGetId([
                'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'],
                'asset_code' => $validated['asset_code'],
                'name' => $validated['name'],
                'replacement_cost_cents' => $validated['replacement_cost_cents'],
                'daily_rate_cents' => (int) ($validated['daily_rate_cents'] ?? 0),
                'weekly_rate_cents' => (int) ($validated['weekly_rate_cents'] ?? 0),
                'deposit_cents' => $deposit,
                'status' => 'available',
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')->insert([
                'asset_id' => $id,
                'facility_id' => $validated['facility_id'],
                'effective_from_utc' => now()->utc(),
                'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            return $id;
        });

        $this->auditLogger->log($request, 'rentals', 'asset_create', 'success', $request->user(), ['asset_id' => $assetId]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $assetId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function updateAsset(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $payload = $request->all();
        $payload['updated_at'] = now()->utc();

        DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $id)->update($payload);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }

    public function checkout(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'asset_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'renter_type' => ['required', 'string'],
            'renter_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'checked_out_at' => ['required', 'date'],
            'expected_return_at' => ['required', 'date', 'after:checked_out_at'],
            'pricing_mode' => ['required', 'in:daily,weekly'],
            'deposit_cents' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'fee_terms' => ['nullable', 'string'],
        ]);

        $conflict = DB::table('rental_checkouts')
            ->where('asset_id', $validated['asset_id'])
            ->whereNull('returned_at')
            ->exists();

        if ($conflict) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('DOUBLE_BOOKING', 'Asset already has an open checkout.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 409);
        }

        $checkoutId = DB::transaction(function () use ($validated, $request) {
            $id = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->insertGetId([
                'asset_id' => $validated['asset_id'],
                'renter_type' => $validated['renter_type'],
                'renter_id' => $validated['renter_id'],
                'checked_out_at' => $validated['checked_out_at'],
                'expected_return_at' => $validated['expected_return_at'],
                'pricing_mode' => $validated['pricing_mode'],
                'deposit_cents' => $validated['deposit_cents'],
                'fee_terms' => $validated['fee_terms'] ?? null,
                'created_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $validated['asset_id'])->update([
                'status' => 'rented',
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            return $id;
        });

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $checkoutId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function returnCheckout(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $checkout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($checkout === null || $checkout->returned_at !== null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Checkout not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::transaction(function () use ($checkout, $id, $request) {
            DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->update([
                'returned_at' => now()->utc(),
                'closed_by_user_id' => $request->user()?->id,
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $checkout->asset_id)->update([
                'status' => 'available',
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        });

        return response()->json([], 204);
    }

    public function getCheckout(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $checkout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($checkout === null) {
            return response()->json(['data' => null], 404);
        }

        $overdueAt = Carbon::parse($checkout->expected_return_at)->addHours(2);
        return response()->json([
            'data' => [
                ... (array) $checkout,
                'is_overdue' => $checkout->returned_at === null && now()->utc()->greaterThan($overdueAt),
                'overdue_at' => $overdueAt->toISOString(),
            ],
        ]);
    }

    public function requestTransfer(Request $request, int $assetId): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'rentals.transfer.request')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Only manager/admin can request transfer.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'to_facility_id' => ['required', 'integer'],
            'requested_effective_at' => ['required', 'date'],
            'reason' => ['required', 'string'],
        ]);

        $asset = DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $assetId)->first();
        if ($asset === null) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Asset not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        $hasOpenCheckout = DB::table('rental_checkouts')->where('asset_id', $assetId)->whereNull('returned_at')->exists();
        if ($hasOpenCheckout || $asset->status === 'maintenance') {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('TRANSFER_BLOCKED', 'Asset has open checkout or maintenance lock.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 409);
        }

        $transferId = DB::table('asset_transfers')->insertGetId([
            'asset_id' => $assetId,
            'from_facility_id' => $asset->facility_id,
            'to_facility_id' => $validated['to_facility_id'],
            'requested_effective_at' => $validated['requested_effective_at'],
            'reason' => $validated['reason'],
            'status' => 'requested',
            'requested_by_user_id' => $user->id,
            'created_at' => now()->utc(),
            'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
        ]);

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $transferId)->first()], 201);
    }

    public function approveTransfer(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $user = $request->user();
        if ($user === null || ! Gate::forUser($user)->allows('permission', 'rentals.transfer.approve')) {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('FORBIDDEN', 'Only manager/admin can approve transfer.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 403);
        }

        $transfer = DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->first();
        if ($transfer === null || $transfer->status !== 'requested') {
            return response()->json(ApiResponse::error('NOT_FOUND', 'Transfer request not found.', ApiResponse::requestId($request)), 404);
        }

        DB::transaction(function () use ($transfer, $id, $user) {
            DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->update([
                'status' => 'completed',
                'decision_by_user_id' => $user->id,
                'decision_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')
                ->where('asset_id', $transfer->asset_id)
                ->whereNull('effective_to_utc')
                ->update([
                    'effective_to_utc' => now()->utc(),
                    'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
                ]);

            DB::table('rental_asset_ownership_history')->insert([
                'asset_id' => $transfer->asset_id,
                'facility_id' => $transfer->to_facility_id,
                'effective_from_utc' => now()->utc(),
                'transfer_request_id' => $id,
                'created_by_user_id' => $user->id,
                'created_at' => now()->utc(),
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);

            DB::table('rental_assets')->where('id', $transfer->asset_id)->update([
                'facility_id' => $transfer->to_facility_id,
                'updated_at' => now()->utc(),
            ]);
        });

        return response()->json(['data' => DB::table('asset_transfers')->where('id', $id)->first()]);
    }
}
